---
title: "Resume"
---

## Current positioning

Data and analytics leader with 15+ years building reproducible data products, workforce models, dashboards, and decision-support tools for government, healthcare, and association clients. Experienced in R, Shiny, SQL, Python, reproducible reporting, client-facing analytics delivery, and translating complex data workflows for technical and executive audiences.

## Resume downloads

- [Data / Analytics Platform Resume](downloads/Clark_Ruttinger_Data_Analytics_Platform_Resume.docx)
- [Posit Senior Customer Success Resume](downloads/Clark_Ruttinger_Posit_Senior_Customer_Success_Resume.docx)

## Selected capabilities

<span class="tag">R</span>
<span class="tag">Shiny</span>
<span class="tag">Posit Connect</span>
<span class="tag">SQL</span>
<span class="tag">Python</span>
<span class="tag">DuckDB</span>
<span class="tag">Reproducible reporting</span>
<span class="tag">Dashboard frameworks</span>
<span class="tag">Client-facing analytics</span>
<span class="tag">Workforce modeling</span>
<span class="tag">Data validation</span>
<span class="tag">Public-sector analytics</span>

## Contact

- Email: [ceruttinger@gmail.com](mailto:ceruttinger@gmail.com)
- LinkedIn: [linkedin.com/in/clark-ruttinger](https://www.linkedin.com/in/clark-ruttinger/)
